prediction should be made when honey, ghee and such other things

If, at a query about a woman's pregnancy, the querist touches
the belly with his or her hand, the woman in question may be pre-
gnant, However, if there should also be bad omens at the time, she
may have miscarriage. The same result will have to be predicted,
if the querist scratches (or drags) his (or her) stomach owing to
the pressure of the seat, or puts one hand on the other,
[The metre is fan ]

When the querist touches the right nostril, the woman in
question may conceive after a month ; when the left nostril or the
left ear, after two years ; when the right ear and the breasts, after
